title: Support parameter names in pattern initialization

features.name: localparam name as bit array assignment pattern key
features.description: Code should include an assignment pattern for a bit array where a localparam name is used as the key index
features.snippet:
localparam int unsigned IDX = 0;
localparam bit arr[2] = '{ IDX: 1'b0, 1: 1'b1 };

features.name: localparam name as logic array assignment pattern key
features.description: Code should include an assignment pattern for a logic array where a localparam name is used as the key index
features.snippet:
localparam int unsigned IDX = 0;
localparam logic [31:0] arr[2] = '{ IDX: 32'h0, 1: 32'h1 };

features.name: multiple localparam names as assignment pattern keys
features.description: Code should include an assignment pattern where multiple different localparam names are used as keys for array initialization
